basic_info.about: Kumaraguru College of Technology (KCT), Coimbatore is an autonomous engineering college established in 1984 under the Ramanandha Adigalar Foundation. It is affiliated with Anna University and approved by AICTE.
basic_info.summary: KCT is a premier private engineering institution in South India, known for its strong focus on research, innovation, and industry-aligned technical education across its 156-acre campus.
basic_info.recognition: Approved by AICTE, Autonomous Status by UGC

programs.raw_output:
Kumaraguru College of Technology \(KCT\) in Coimbatore offers a wide range of academic programs across engineering, technology, management, and computer applications. Its curriculum is largely affiliated with Anna University. [6] [11]

### Undergraduate Programs \(B.E. / B.Tech\)

KCT offers 4\-year undergraduate degrees in approximately 14 specializations. [3] [5]

- Bachelor of Engineering \(B.E.\):
  - Aeronautical Engineering
  - Automobile Engineering
  - Civil Engineering
  - Computer Science and Engineering
  - Electrical and Electronics Engineering
  - Electronics and Communication Engineering
  - Electronics and Instrumentation Engineering
  - Mechanical Engineering
  - Mechatronics Engineering
  - Robotics and Automation Engineering
- Bachelor of Technology \(B.Tech\):
  - Artificial Intelligence & Data Science
  - Biotechnology
  - Fashion Technology
  - Information Technology
  - Textile Technology

### Postgraduate Programs \(M.E. / M.Tech / MBA / MCA\)

Postgraduate courses generally last 2 years and focus on specialized professional training. [1] [2]

- Master of Engineering \(M.E.\):
  - Communication Systems
  - Construction Management
  - Embedded Systems Technologies
  - Environmental Engineering
  - Industrial Engineering
  - Structural Engineering
  - VLSI Design
- Master of Technology \(M.Tech\):
  - Biotechnology
  - Data Science
  - Defence Technology
  - Technology Management
  - Technical Textile
- Management & Computer Applications:
  - MBA: Includes specializations in General Management, Project Management, Logistics & Supply Chain Management, and Innovation, Entrepreneurship & Venture Development \(IEVD\).
  - MCA: Master of Computer Applications.

### Doctoral Programs \(Ph.D.\)

KCT hosts 12 research centers recognized by Anna University for full\-time and part\-time Ph.D. research. Major research disciplines include: [4]

- Engineering: Civil, Mechanical, Computer Science, Electrical & Electronics, and Electronics & Communication Engineering.
- Technology: Biotechnology, Fashion Technology, and Textile Technology.
- Other: Management Studies, Physics, Chemistry, and Mathematics.

Would you like more details on the admission criteria or entrance exams required for any of these specific programs?

placements.graduate_outcomes_note: The 2025 placement drive is currently ongoing. While the highest package saw a significant 138% increase compared to 2024, the overall placement percentage and number of students placed have shown a downward trend compared to previous record-high years.

placements.placement_highlights: Kumaraguru College of Technology maintained a strong placement record through 2025 with a notable peak highest package of 50 LPA. While the placement rate moderated to approximately 85% in 2025 compared to nearly 96-99% in previous years, the institution continues to secure significant participation from over 500 recruiters across core, product, and IT sectors.

fees.fees_note: Fees vary significantly by admission quota; government quota (TNEA) for UG is approximately ₹55,000–₹1,16,200 per year, while management quota can reach ₹1,40,000–₹1,50,000 per year. PG tuition for ME/MTech is generally consistent at ₹50,000 per year for non-accredited courses, and MBA ranges from ₹35,000 (tuition only) to higher total packages. Hostel fees include room rent, mess charges, and a one-time caution deposit.

scholarships_detail.name: KCT Sports Scholarship
scholarships_detail.eligibility: Excellence in sports at state/national levels

infrastructure.details: Sprawling 150-acre lush green campus with modern academic blocks and research facilities.
Air-conditioned Swami Vivekanandham Auditorium with a seating capacity of 1800.
Four seminar halls with 200-person capacity and four smaller halls with 150-person capacity.
Includes KRAFT (Gymnasium), 23 acres of paved playgrounds, and separate indoor game facilities.
165 specialized labs including 10 Government and Industry sponsored Excellence Centres.

hostel_details.type: Separate Boys (6 blocks) and Girls (3 blocks) hostels

scholarships.name: Mahatma Gandhi Merit Scholarship
scholarships.eligibility: Awarded to top performers based on academic excellence (CGPA ≥ 8.5 for renewal).

scholarships.name: Merit Scholarship – Category Cut-off
scholarships.eligibility: Highest cut-off in program (min. 190/200), admitted via single window counseling.

scholarships.name: Centum Score Scholarship
scholarships.eligibility: Centum in Mathematics in qualifying exam, admitted via single window counseling.

scholarships.name: Rural Students Scholarship
scholarships.eligibility: Topper from rural school with min. cut-off 180/200; requires Headmaster certificate.

scholarships.name: Sports Scholarship
scholarships.eligibility: Outstanding records in National/International level competitions; admitted under Management Quota.

scholarships.name: Sakthi Grant
scholarships.eligibility: Offered to students in significant financial need to cover tuition fees.

scholarships.name: Military Grant
scholarships.eligibility: Exclusively for children of parents serving or who have served in Indian Defense/Police forces.

scholarships.name: Government of Tamil Nadu Scholarship (BC/MBC/DNC)
scholarships.eligibility: Based on community criteria and annual family income within government limits.

scholarships.name: AICTE Pragati & Saksham Scholarships
scholarships.eligibility: Pragati: Merit-based for girls; Saksham: For specially-abled students.
